prestazioni: Engine swap to a **4G63T (7-bolt, 2.0L turbo)** from a Mitsubishi Lancer Evolution III/IV, retaining the Delica's AWD system with a **custom bellhousing adapter (PPG or Quaife)** to mate the transmission (V5MT1 or V5M41) to the 4G63T. Upgrade the turbo to a **Garrett GT2860RS-5 (0.64 A/R, 60 trim)** with a **custom stainless steel manifold (Tomei or custom-fabricated)** and **3-inch downpipe with a GReddy SP2 cat-back exhaust** for optimal spool and flow.

Full **Ohlins Road & Track coilovers (DFV)** with **custom spring rates (8kg/mm front, 6kg/mm rear)** and **polyurethane bushings (SuperPro or Whiteline)** for the front control arms, rear trailing arms, and subframe mounts to eliminate flex. Replace the stock sway bars with **Ultra Racing 22mm front and 18mm rear adjustable sway bars** to reduce body roll during high-speed off-road or track use.

Fuel system upgrade with a **Walbro 450 LPH in-tank pump**, **ID1000x injectors**, and a **Radium Engineering fuel pressure regulator (FPR)** to support 400+ HP. Pair with a **Haltech Elite 2500 ECU** for full standalone tuning, including **individual cylinder trims, launch control, and anti-lag (2-step) for rally-style starts**. Add a **Mishimoto aluminum radiator (custom core size)** and **dual 12-inch SPAL fans** to prevent overheating in extreme conditions.
estetica: Full **Rocket Bunny Delica-specific widebody kit (Pandem)** with **custom carbon fiber fender flares (Seibon or VIS Racing)** to accommodate the **265/70R16 BFGoodrich KM3 tires on Method MR701 wheels (16x8 +15 offset)**. Install a **custom front lip (3D-printed ABS or carbon fiber)** with integrated **LED light bar mounts (Rigid Industries 30-inch E-Series)** for off-road functionality.

Interior overhaul with **Recaro SRD-E bucket seats (Mitsubishi-specific mounts)** and a **custom roll cage (Custom Cages UK, 6-point, TIG-welded chromoly)** integrated with a **Sparco 6-point harness (Pro 2000)**. Replace the stock dash with a **Motec C127 digital dash** and **custom aluminum gauge pods (Defi or AEM)** for oil pressure, boost, and wideband AFR monitoring. Add **sound deadening (Dynamat Extreme)** and **custom Alcantara headliner (EuroCompulsion)** for a premium feel.

Exterior lighting upgrade with **Morimoto XB LED headlights (H4 retrofit)** and **custom JDM-style taillight housings (Depo or custom CNC-machined)** with **Lux H8 LED bulbs**. Apply a **full vinyl wrap (3M Gloss Black or Avery Dennison Matte Military Green)** with **custom rally-style decals (BST or local motorsport graphics shop)** and **carbon fiber hood (Seibon, vented for turbo clearance)** to reduce weight and improve aerodynamics.
